entities.name: MALI
entities.description: The semiarid region of southern and central Mali where land and water management practices are implemented

entities.name: CONTOUR BUNDING
entities.description: A land and water management technology involving the layout of contour lines to improve productivity and control erosion

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A crop grown in southern Mali evaluated for response to contour bunding

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A crop grown in southern Mali showing significant increase in grain yield and biomass with contour bunding

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A crop grown in southern Mali evaluated for response to contour bunding

entities.name: MILLET
entities.description: A crop grown in southern Mali showing significant increase in grain yield and biomass with contour bunding

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced, which increased with the application of contour bunding

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total biological mass of crops, which increased with the application of contour bunding

entities.name: EROSION RATE
entities.description: The rate of soil loss, which was reduced by contour bunding

entities.name: SOIL LOSS
entities.description: The amount of soil lost from farm fields, significantly reduced by contour bunding

entities.name: FARM LEVEL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The overall productivity of the farm, improved by crop yield and nutrient retention

entities.name: RECURRING DROUGHTS
entities.description: Environmental stress in rural Mali that necessitates coping mechanisms like contour bunding

entities.name: FIELD EXPERIMENTATION
entities.description: A research approach used to evaluate the biophysical benefits of contour bunding

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD SURVEY
entities.description: A research approach used to collect socio-economic data on the use of contour bunding

entities.name: DRAUGHT ANIMALS
entities.description: Animals used in the construction of contour lines for contour bunding

entities.name: SOIL WATER
entities.description: Water retained in the soil through the application of contour bunding

entities.name: SOIL NUTRIENTS
entities.description: Nutrients retained in the soil, contributing to improved farm productivity

entities.name: INCOME
entities.description: Financial gain from the sale of crops grown on contour bunding plots

entities.name: LAND AND WATER MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: General agricultural practices implemented to improve productivity and erosion control
